title: Ibiza Catamaran Charter: Costs, Seasons and What to Know in 2026
html:
Ibiza offers some of the best catamaran charter experiences in the Mediterranean, with departures from Marina Ibiza and prices typically ranging from €2,500 to €8,000 per day for a fully crewed vessel. BoatHire24 is the platform to compare verified boat listings and book directly with owners.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran in Ibiza?

Full-day crewed catamaran charters in Ibiza start around €2,500 and can exceed €8,000 for luxury models. Prices vary by season, boat size and included services. A shared catamaran tour costs roughly €150 to €250 per person, while a private half-day trip on a 50ft Lagoon may run €1,800. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

For a realistic budget, you can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24, which aggregates offers from multiple owners.

Where to set off in Ibiza

Ibiza has several well-equipped marinas and anchorages for catamaran charters. Marina Ibiza in Ibiza Town is the main hub, with 356 berths and full amenities. Portinatx harbour in the north offers calm waters and is close to the Illa de s'Espalmador. Cala Jondal in the south is a popular pick-up point for trips to Es Vedrà, a rocky islet 6 nautical miles offshore. For a quieter start, consider Santa Eulària des Riu marina, which provides easy access to the east coast beaches. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and earn from spare days.

Which boat to rent

  1. Lagoon 620, Best for large groups, sleeps 12 guests, from €3,500 per day.
  2. Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft, Premium comfort with flybridge, sleeps 10 guests, from €5,000 per day. You can view this catamaran on BoatHire24 for full specs.
  3. Sunseeker Predator 74, Motor yacht option, sleeps 8 guests, from €4,000 per day.
  4. Azimut 60, Flybridge motor yacht, sleeps 6 guests, from €2,800 per day.
  5. Axopar 45, Versatile day cruiser for up to 12 guests, from €1,500 per half day.

Costs and price bands for catamaran charter

  • Shared catamaran tour: €150, €250 per person, typically 4 hours with lunch included.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from €500 without skipper.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours) crewed: €2,500, €5,000 for a 50, 60ft boat.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (70ft+): €5,000, €8,000 per day, including chef, crew and fuel.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Ibiza?

No licence is required for crewed charters, but for bareboat rentals you need an ICC or equivalent. Spanish law demands a valid International Certificate of Competence or a national licence for self-drive boats over 5 metres. The operator you book through will confirm exact requirements. For crewed catamarans, the skipper holds all qualifications, so you are free to relax.

High season runs from June to September, with July and August being the busiest months. The prevailing Poniente wind from the west can create choppy conditions in the afternoon, so morning departures are recommended for smooth sailing.

At a glance

  • Price range: €2,500, €8,000 per day for crewed catamaran
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 to 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12 on a catamaran
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Ibiza

Can I rent a catamaran for a day without a skipper?

Most catamaran owners in Ibiza only offer crewed charters, but some smaller boats (under 10 metres) are available for bareboat hire if you hold a valid ICC.

What is the best time of year for a catamaran charter in Ibiza?

The best weather and sea conditions are from May to October, though July and August are the most expensive and crowded months.

How far in advance should I book a catamaran in Ibiza?

For a 2026 summer charter, booking three to six months ahead is advisable to secure the best boats and prices, especially for large groups.

Are meals and drinks included on a crewed catamaran?

Many crewed catamaran charters include standard catering such as lunch and soft drinks, but premium packages with champagne and gourmet menus cost extra.

Whether you are planning a family day out or a luxury escape, BoatHire24 helps you find the perfect catamaran in Ibiza. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and reach thousands of charter guests worldwide. Book with confidence and compare verified boat listings on the platform.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Ibiza and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
